# chalk_offline_store_connection_test (Data Source)

Tests an offline store connection by calling the Chalk API. Intended for use in lifecycle preconditions on `chalk_environment_offline_store_connection_binding`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) The ID of the environment the connection is scoped to.
- `offline_store_connection_id` (String) The ID of the offline store connection to test.

### Read-Only

- `error_message` (String) Error message if the connection test failed, empty otherwise.
- `success` (Boolean) Whether the connection test passed.
